name: imba
description: ONLY for major escalations or truly historic events (wars starting, leaders assassinated, market crashes, natural disasters killing thousands) — use sparingly

name: geopolityka
description: international relations, diplomacy, foreign policy, conflicts, global political developments that are not imba-level

name: opracowania
description: articles that read like a book, investigative journalism

name: sprawa dla spekulanta
description: event likely to affect financial markets
